scripts.dev:full: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "npm run tunnel:cloudflare"
scripts.dev:full:localtunnel: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "npm run tunnel:localtunnel"
scripts.tunnel:cloudflare: echo TUNNEL_FORWARD_PORT=4000 && sleep 4 && cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:4000
scripts.tunnel:cloudflare:ipv4: echo TUNNEL_FORWARD_PORT=4000 && sleep 4 && cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:4000 --edge-ip-version 4
scripts.db:push: cd server && npx prisma db push
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
